verdict: PRIVATE BETA READY WITH SETUP LIMITATIONS

audit_scope.frontend_routing: Rebuilt around routed dashboard pages under /dashboard with /app redirect preserved.
audit_scope.dashboard_navigation: Bulky sidebar path avoided; DashboardShell now uses compact horizontal top navigation with mobile horizontal scroll.
audit_scope.settings_opening_path: Fixed with dedicated /dashboard/settings SettingsPage using extracted SettingsPanel; SettingsDialog remains for workspace/header usage.
audit_scope.media_library_opening_path: Added /dashboard/media MediaPage; MediaLibraryDialog remains available from workspace/header.
audit_scope.project_list_responsibilities: Split the old monolithic ProjectList responsibilities across DashboardHome, NewBuildPage, ProjectsPage, RepoWorkbenchPage, MediaPage, and SettingsPage.
audit_scope.workspace_layout: Desktop multi-panel layout preserved; mobile/tablet gets Chat, Preview, Timeline, Files, and QA tabs.
audit_scope.login_errors: Login now states Approved users only, maps 401 to a useful credential/approval message, and links to Request Access.
audit_scope.live_preview_token_handling: Fixed normal JWT iframe leak by adding POST /api/projects/{project_id}/preview-token and using preview_token in LivePreview.
audit_scope.capability_status_display: Frontend now uses /api/capabilities/status in CapabilityStatus, SettingsPanel, and RepoWorkbenchPage where practical.
audit_scope.public_website_pages: /, /features, /pipeline, /access, /contact, and /login exist; landing/features/pipeline were rewritten for private-beta positioning and truthful claims.
audit_scope.mobile_tablet_responsiveness: Dashboard nav uses horizontal top nav without side rail; workspace has mobile tabs; settings/media pages are scrollable.
audit_scope.current_go_live_blockers: No critical frontend blockers remain from this audit. Provider keys remain setup limitations, not product blockers.

capability_truth.genx_text_reasoning_image_repo_analysis: Requires setup unless GENX_API_KEY is configured
capability_truth.qwen_video_audio_voice: Not configured unless QWEN_API_KEY and model settings are configured
capability_truth.github_private_repo_pr: Requires setup unless GITHUB_PAT is configured
capability_truth.brave_web_research: Not configured unless BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY is configured
capability_truth.pixabay_stock_media: Not configured unless PIXABAY_API_KEY is configured

implementation_notes: DashboardLayout sidebar UX was replaced with DashboardShell top navigation.
SettingsPanel is shared by SettingsDialog and SettingsPage to avoid duplicated settings logic.
MediaPage gives a routed media library surface while preserving MediaLibraryDialog for existing workspace flows.
Backend preview route now requires scoped preview_token query parameter; frontend no longer appends localStorage JWT to iframe URLs.
Runtime sandbox import is now Windows-safe by making Unix resource limits optional outside POSIX.
Existing backend tests now skip bash-only dry-run checks when bash is unavailable on Windows.
